title: Delicious Portuguese Cheese Pie
description: A tangy, crumbly Portuguese cheese pie with a unique genmaicha twist, brine-wet and Ayurvedic Rajasic-friendly for a festive spread.
instructions: Combine flour, salt, and cold butter in a bowl and blend until crumbs form.
Gradually add ice water and mix until the dough comes together.
Form the dough into a disc, wrap it in plastic, and chill for 30 minutes.
Roll the dough to a 12cm circle, place it in a 20cm pie dish, and trim the edges.
Whisk the egg, milk, black pepper, and genmaicha together in a bowl.
Fold the crumbled queijo-fresco into the mixture.
Pour the filling into the crust, drizzle with olive oil, and sprinkle parsley on top.
Bake for 25 minutes until the crust is golden and the filling is set.
Let the pie rest for 10 minutes before serving.
